message:
The other day, I had one of those moments that made me feel like I actually had my act together. I was in the kitchen, whipping up dinner, when I suddenly remembered my smoke alarm was due for a battery change. Instead of putting it off (I’m guilty of that more often than I’d like to admit), I grabbed a new battery and changed it right then and there. I even took a moment to review our family’s fire escape plan. 

It felt great to finally be the prepared one for once! It’s funny how little steps like these can really boost your confidence when it comes to home safety. 

Have you had any moments where you felt like you were ahead of the game? 😊 Oh, and by the way, this little refresher helped too!
